reviews.review_description:
Overview of game🌅
1. Good lobby🏠!
2. PVP⚔️!
3. Park🛝!
4. Horror👻
5. good cosmetics🎩!
6. Great mods🛠️!
7. Content creator badge📸!
8. easily one of the best fangames I’ve played🏆!
Have fun!

Banana grounds is the best gorilla tag fan game out there I highly recommend this game to everybody! This game is super fun with lots of fun and exciting game modes to try out. The cosmetics, community and in general everything in this game is top tier 10/10 game would recommend

reviews.review_description: This game is genuinely amazing, I think that even if I didn't start playing this game as early as I did I would still always rate it 5 stars.

reviews.review_title: PLAY THE GAME ITS SO GOOD
reviews.review_description: Bro this game is a 10/10. I personally love it just because of how creative the owner is he has only up, pvp zero g and more coming soon this game is personally my fav fan game. it’s still getting worked on but if you want to play it and see some cool stuff go download it and maybe you will even see some moderators there literally always active😀
